attributes.description: Alerts when `ibmmq_qmgr_cpu_load_five_minute_average_percentage > 85`. High CPU degrades message throughput and inflates latency.
attributes.name: [IBM MQ OTel] CPU load high

investigation_guide.blob:
## IBM MQ queue manager CPU load high

### What fired
Five-minute CPU load average exceeded 85% on at least one queue manager.

### Why it matters
CPU-bound queue managers cannot maintain published throughput; log writes slow, put/get latency rises, and channels back up.

### Triage
1. Identify the qmgr and compare with co-located workloads on the host.
2. Correlate with log write latency and rollback ratios.
3. Check for sudden client burst patterns.

### Remediation
- Move the qmgr to a less contended host.
- Throttle producers.

### Tuning
- 85% over 15 minutes; lower to 80% for earlier warning.
